channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I might have grown up on classic Lego, but I've got my eye on these 12 modern sets thanks to some tempting Amazon discounts
item.description: Who said Lego was just for kids? If, like me, you love the popular building blocks, I've picked my favourites currently discounted by up to 33% on Amazon's Big Smile Sale.

item.title: What is the release date for Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 4 on CBS and Paramount+?
item.description: As Kayce Dutton slowly finds his footing in the US Marshals, when does Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 4 hit CBS and Paramount+?

item.title: Anthropic just shipped an OpenClaw killer called Claude Code Channels, letting you message it over Telegram and Discord
item.description: The hit open source autonomous AI agent OpenClaw may have just gotten mogged by Anthropic. Today, Anthropic announced Claude Code Channels, a way to hook up its own powerful Claude Code AI agentic harness to a human user's Discord or Telegram messaging applications, letting them message Claude Code directly whenever they want while on the go and instruct it to write code for them. Official documentation is here.This isn't just a new UI; it is a fundamental shift in how developers interact with AI agents, moving from a synchronous "ask-and-wait" model to an asynchronous, autonomous partnership....

item.title: I’m a home appliance fiend and these 7 everyday essentials are a steal in the Afterpay Day sales
item.description: Afterpay Day is here and I’ve spotted some of our most-recommended home appliances with sweet discounts — I’ve put together the best deals with discounts of up to 51%.

item.title: Google wants to fill Fitbit with AI — and your medical records
item.description: Google focuses on AI features in the Fitbit app, and allows you to upload your medical records to the data-hungry company.

item.title: 'That’s where the danger lies': Uber's former self-driving car boss sounds safety alarm after near-death Tesla experience — as Cybertruck crash sparks fresh controversy
item.description: Uber’s former head of self-driving critiques Tesla's Full Self-Driving system following crash.

item.title: I tested Asus’ new open earbuds for weeks, and I love their great sound and comfort level — but they’re so ugly I’m actually impressed
item.description: The Asus Rog Cetra Open earbuds are seriously comfortable, but their high price tag and ugly design make them difficult to wholeheartedly recommend.

item.title: Ryan Gosling improvised one of Project Hail Marys best moments
item.description: "Project Hail Mary" is full of improvisation between Ryan Gosling and the puppeteers behind alien Rocky.

item.title: Project Hail Marys ending makes one big change from the book. Heres why.
item.description: "Project Hail Mary" sticks fairly closely to Andy Weir's novel, with one notable change to the ending.

item.title: How did Harry Styles Sign of the Times wind up in Project Hail Mary? Thank Sandra Hüller.
item.description: "Project Hail Mary" star Sandra Hüller agreed to sing karaoke in the film on one condition: that she sing "Sign of the Times."

item.title: Valve’s huge SteamOS 3.8 update adds long-awaited features — and supports Steam Machine
item.description: Valve has just released SteamOS 3.8.0 in preview, and it's a doozy. Not only is it the first release to support the upcoming Steam Machine living room gaming PC, it comes with long-awaited features for Valve's handhelds and more support for other companies' handhelds than we've seen to date - including Microsoft and Asus' Xbox […]
